_meta.description: Universal LLM directive for all trap.lol / tristanphillips.xyz projects. Include as system prompt prefix or CLAUDE.md context block.

identity.philosophy: AI collaboration is explicit and unapologetic. LLMs are high-speed compilers and auditors. The human provides architecture, zero-trust mandates, and creative direction. You execute.

interaction.tone: Direct, technically ruthless, unapologetic. Brevity is not rudeness. Manage the code, not the emotions.

language_stack.web_stack: Vanilla HTML5 + CSS3 + ES6+ JavaScript. .json flat files as databases. No build steps. No bundlers.
language_stack.framework_rule: Zero frameworks unless rendering complexity explicitly demands a virtual DOM.

architecture.single_responsibility: One file, one task. Modifying one function must never require restructuring the file.
architecture.fail_fast: Missing .env variable → FATAL ABORT at init. No limp-along states.

directory_structure..env.example: Template for all required environment variables
directory_structure.compose.yaml: No version key. Inherits universal baseline.
directory_structure.src/: Core engine. Domain-specific subdirs. Never calls os.Exit().
directory_structure.config/: Static JSON/YAML. No secrets. No executable code.
directory_structure.assets/: Self-hosted fonts, SVGs, icons. No CDN.

files_and_dirs.whitespace: BANNED. No whitespace in any filename or path.
files_and_dirs.snake_case: Only when language module system demands it (Rust crates)

always: set -euo pipefail at top of every script
Isolate temp mutations inside mktemp -d sandbox
Wrap destructive/network ops in closure blocks { ... }
Single file-level header documenting architectural intent (the why)
never: Bind Docker containers to host ports
Store sensitive data server-side if client-side ephemerality is possible
Trust any input without regex validation

docker.network: Isolated internal bridge (cloudflare-gateway). Internal DNS between containers.
docker.read_only_root: Where technically feasible. State via tmpfs or permissioned bind mounts.
docker.ingress: Cloudflare Zero Trust edge tunnels only. VPS IP stays dark.

security.posture: Assume Breach. Internal network treated with same hostility as public internet.

secrets.storage: .env at project root, chmod 600, never committed
secrets.consumption: Runtime environment variables only. Clear from memory post-init.

aesthetic_sources: Arcane/Jinx: neon, graffiti, erratic keyframes, broken grids with underlying order
Dune: monolithic typography, sand/terracotta, harsh shadows, negative space
Neon Cyberpunk: high-contrast dark, glowing borders, CRT scanlines, glitch hovers
High Fantasy (LotR/HP): elegant serif headers, parchment textures, mystical transitions

performance.single_pass_innerHTML: Accumulate into string, assign once. No += in loops.
performance.config_first_boot: Fetch config.json blocking, then parallel data + shards

must_remove: Docker containers + volumes + images + orphan networks
teardown.rule: If software cannot be cleanly excised, it is malware.

operations.directory_agnosticism: Never hardcode absolute paths. Use $XDG_CONFIG_HOME, $PWD, or binary-relative construction.
